last_action: Ran live DB proof for TMP-053 and TMP-054 prerequisites. Credentials found in services/acquisition-api/.env. Acquisition side: 5 of 6 tables have non-zero tenantless rows (4873 userbase, 74 transactions, 10 products, 5 campaigns, 2 postback). Subscription/cadence side: migrations 016/017 not applied to live DB — tenant_id column absent from subscriptions and related tables. TMP-055 enforcement is definitively blocked by live data evidence.
